## Safety classification

- [ ] Documentation-only
- [ ] Code without productive integrations

## Mandatory project boundaries

This PR does not introduce:

- [ ] real client, receipt, tax, office or metadata
- [ ] secrets, credentials or tokens
- [ ] productive Agenda, ELSTER, storage, cloud or database integrations
- [ ] direct write access to tax, Agenda, ELSTER or client systems
- [ ] autonomous tax decisions
- [ ] individual tax advice by the model
- [ ] Public-LLM processing of confidential or derived confidential content

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Scope is small and reviewable
- [ ] No real client, receipt, tax, office or metadata is included
- [ ] No secrets are included
- [ ] No productive Agenda, ELSTER, storage, cloud or database interface is activated
- [ ] Relevant documentation is present or updated
- [ ] Relevant tests/checks are present and green, or not applicable for this PR
- [ ] Schemas are validated, or not applicable for this PR
- [ ] Security and privacy impact was checked
- [ ] No tax decision path exists without Human Review
- [ ] `git status --short` is clean after commit

## Human Review

- [ ] This PR preserves the principle: KI bereitet vor. Die Kanzlei prüft. Der Steuerberater entscheidet.
